name: procurement directors in mid-sized manufacturing companies processing 10-20 purchase requisitions/week tool
description: For procurement directors in mid-sized manufacturing companies processing 10-20 invoices/week, inefficient tracking causes late orders. We extract and consolidate purchase requisition data instead of manual tracking and reporting via spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement directors in mid-sized manufacturing companies processing 10-20 purchase requisitions/week
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking and reporting of purchase requisition data.
features: Weekly email summaries of purchase requisition data
Manual data entry for requisition details
Basic reporting dashboard for requisition status
